name: Refrigerator
description: Ct is a single mother to 2 youths, 1 of whom is still in school, and 1 is working. Ct has multiple physical and mental health conditions, and has not been able to work for the past years, as she is partially bed-bound. Ct's eldest son is supporting the family, but his salary is insufficient to meet family's basic needs, including ct's medical needs. Ct's daughter juggles school and caregiving of ct. The family's refrigerator has broken down, and they are in need of one to store their perishables.

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Bukit Panjang
contact.name: Muhammad Idris Bin Mohd Margono

name: Chest of drawers
description:
The client suffers from glaucoma, with complete loss of vision in his left eye and progressive vision loss in his right eye. He has a significant medical history including three strokes and two heart attacks, which has affected his mobility. He requires the use of a walking stick/motorised wheelchair for mobility. He also experiences breathing difficulties and relies on a CPAP machine to assist with sleep. The client attends multiple medical appointments on an ongoing basis.

As a result of the wife’s sudden health complications, the family has incurred increased expenses and requires changes to furniture to accommodate to health complications

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Bukit Panjang
contact.name: Muhammad Idris Bin Mohd Margono

passiton.name: Cot and matching chest of drawers
passiton.description: Baby cot and matching chest of drawers with built in changing mat

name: Dining table
description: Client who is transiting to Long-home-leave after a 1 year residential stay at HCSA Highpoint. He needs a small dining table as he is staying in an L-shape rental flat. Table will be placed against the wall.

passiton.name: Wooden Dining table
passiton.description: Chairs not included. Comes with glass top.

name: Bed with mattress
description:
Client is a single mother moving to a new rental flat with her 3 young children. Client is unemployed as she needs to provide care to her infant child.

The family requires a bed with mattress, ideally with in-build storage spaces. The bed can be either a double decker bed or king/queen-size bed.

contact.org: Fei Yue Family Service Centre @ Champions Way
contact.name: Eileen Yong

passiton.name: Loft bed with mattress
passiton.description: White wooden loft bed with mattress
passiton.location: Chancery , Dunearn Road, Moulmein, Newton, Novena, Thomson, Watten Estate

name: single mattress
description:
The client is experiencing significant caregiving stress in managing her 16-year-old son alongside her 21-year-old son with special needs. The family is also facing financial constraints, as the client’s husband is the sole breadwinner with a limited income. 

Recently, the client’s 21-year-old son urinated on the mattress. The provision of super single mattress would greatly support the family by restoring a basic level of comfort and functionality in their home.

super single mattress from king coil
wooden frame
